div1.entryFree: Canopy, vb., to cover as with a canopy: trees . . . which erst from heat did c. the herd, Sonn. 12, 6. her eyes had sheathed their light, and --ied in darkness sweetly lay, Lucr. 398. the enclosed lights (viz the eyes) now --ied under these windows, Cymb. II, 2, 21. love-thoughts lie rich when --ied with bowers, Tw. I, 1, 41.
